[[inst_maddw]]
==== MADDW

*Syntax:* maddw SrcL, SrcR, SrcD, ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* Multiply (word): Dst = SrcL * SrcR, high part Dst1.

image::../generated/encodings/enc_maddw.svg[MADDW encoding,width=800]
